name: nyx-fund-mcp
description: MCP server for hedge fund operations — fund fee calculators (management/performance fees, high-water mark), NAV validation, exposure analysis, and fund-ops docs search from Nyx Fund. Free public server, no API key required; connects Claude, Cursor, and any MCP client to nyxchain.org.
author: Nyx Capital <jack@nyxchain.org> (https://nyxchain.org)
